_note: Starter templates. Each is a working minimal definition that the runner's validateDefinition accepts. After instantiation operators usually customise prompts and targeting. body-string interpolation (n1.text etc.) is NOT supported in HTTP nodes today — use a `transform` node to build dynamic JSON when needed (vt-0237).

templates.name: Weekly Audit Review
templates.description: Single Claude session prompted with a fixed instruction to fetch + summarise audit anomalies via its tools (Bash / Read). Output appears in the run's transcript; the operator can pipe it elsewhere by editing the template.

nodes.prompt: Fetch the last 7 days of audit rows from /api/audit?limit=500 (use Bash + curl with $VAULT_RAG_API_TOKEN). Summarize denied/error rows by caller_id as Markdown bullets. Save the summary to 00-inbox/weekly-audit-review.md via /api/put.

templates.name: Host Health Check (claude)
templates.description: Single Claude session that ssh's into prod hosts and aggregates `uptime; df -h /; journalctl -n 5` into a Markdown table. Operator should customise the host list inside the prompt.

nodes.prompt: For each host in $PROD_HOSTS (space-separated env var), run via ssh: `uptime; df -h /; journalctl -n 5 --no-pager`. Aggregate into one Markdown table sorted by load. Save to 05-logs/host-health-$(date +%F).md via /api/put.

templates.name: Quarterly Secret Rotation
templates.description: Two-node workflow: rotate GH_TOKEN, then note the rotation in the inbox. HTTP nodes hit /api/secrets/rotate with a literal {name} body (no per-run interpolation). Operator should duplicate the rotate node for each secret they want to rotate.

nodes.prompt: Append a line to 00-inbox/rotation-log.md (via /api/put mode=append): 'Rotated GH_TOKEN on <today UTC ISO date>.'
